text:
现在周围人发文件都变成 Markdown 和 HTML 了，但是微信这俩格式一个都不支持，而且相当封闭，想用其他应用打开都费劲，真是受不了。

如果是在外面用手机，别人发过来的 Markdown 和 HTML 文件都不知道怎么打开。

感觉得做个手机上的 HTML 和 Markdown 阅读器了。

当然，浏览器也可以打开 HTML 文件，但是整个交互链路太复杂、太长了，体验很糟糕。

现在的浏览器其实是为你给它链接、然后它打开网页这种场景设计的，而不是为了从一个文档阅读器的角度去设计的。
说干就干朋友们，开新坑了 https://t.co/krhtB4WR17

The AI crowd keeps worshipping giant models.

Meanwhile, MiniCPM-5 1B is trying to make them look bloated.

A 1B open-source model that runs locally, on CPUs, edge devices, and even browsers.

Tiny model. Real deployment. No GPU cult required. https://t.co/XWH8uso0SE

This is not another “cute small model” demo.

MiniCPM-5 1B is positioned as the new performance ceiling for its size class, beating 1B-ish rivals like Qwen3.5-0.8B and LFM2.5-1.2B-Thinking across knowledge, math, coding, and tool use.

That matters because 1B models are where AI

The best proof is the desktop pet demo.

Not because it’s adorable.

Because it shows a capable AI app running locally without begging some cloud API every 4 seconds.

This is what on-device AI should look like:

fast, cheap, responsive, and actually usable. https://t.co/xY3pGgWNRJ

The deployment numbers are the real flex:

FP16: ~2GB VRAM
INT8: ~1GB
INT4/Q4: ~0.5GB

That puts real AI workflows on normal machines, edge boxes, tablets, browsers, and local dev stacks.

Less “enterprise AI theater.”

More shipping.

And here’s the part that feels like foreshadowing:

MiniCPM-5 1B was pre-trained with ForgeTrain, an AI-coded training framework claimed to be 10% faster than NVIDIA Megatron.

AI isn’t just running apps now.

It’s starting to build the factory.

Try it. Break it.

Contribute:

Your network and community means everything. Got up to a phone full of messages from people who got laid off by different IT companies. Talented, hard working, with great titles, some even got promotions less than two months ago. 
I helped each of them with a referral, their CV,

Yep, I now have: Half a Million followers!

Thank you everyone. 

I think this virality validates how refreshing people find it…

When someone posts compelling ideas and research for free.

Especially while focusing on substance instead of a focus on selling you expensive https://t.co/UbypbJOeSe
